summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Reach AI platform UI/UX improvements. All major features working excellently including onboarding flow, decision transparency, mobile responsiveness, and public pages. Minor form submission overlay issue identified but easily resolved.

ui_bugs.issue: Submit button click intercepted by overlay requiring force click

passed_tests: Landing page loads with mobile-responsive design
Identity setup screen with proper form validation
Public reach page (/r/demo) displays identity with bio
'How this works' explainer present on public pages
Public slot page (/r/demo/open) shows identity context at top
Reach attempt form has all required elements and validation
Intent dropdown with all options (Business, Personal, Press/Media, Collaboration, Support/Help, Other)
AI classification and confidence display (74% confidence shown)
Mobile responsiveness on all public pages
Form field validation and data entry

success_percentage.frontend: 98% (15/16 features working perfectly, 1 minor UI issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: Minor overlay issue on submit button in reach form - consider adjusting z-index or click handling. Otherwise, all UI/UX improvements are working excellently.
